case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. LEONARD KACZMARSKI et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KACZMARSKI, LEONARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 175 SIXTH STREET, #307, S.F. CA. 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KACZMARSKI, LEONARD
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT KACZMARSKI, LEONARD
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT KACZMARSKI, LEONARD ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $115.01 RE 22387 FOR TRANSACTION W1608C16R027 (RENT DEPOSIT), PAYABLE TO JOHN STEWART CO., DOC1901682798, WARRANT #38002648, DATED DEC-31-2008
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT AND PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY SERVED NOV-14-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KACZMARSKI, LEONARD

ORDER OF THE COURT FOR STAY OF EXECUTION. STAY DATE IS DEC.23,2008 UNTIL 5:00 P.M.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT KACZMARSKI, LEONARD DOES 1-5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
